theme_and_archetype.vibe: Premium creator-tool, emotional intelligence, dark mode glassmorphism, cinematic, moody

surfaces_and_micro_themes.glassmorphism_card: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/[0.08] shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)] rounded-2xl
surfaces_and_micro_themes.interactive_widget: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.08] hover:bg-white/[0.04] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 rounded-2xl

charts.style: Remove default cartesian grids, use ultra-thin lines. Axes should be muted text-zinc-600. Add glowing drop-shadows to line strokes using SVG filters.
charts.reputation_meter: RadialBarChart (0-100) with gradient stroke (Red -> Yellow -> Cyan) representing sentiment health.

forms.input: bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.08] text-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF] focus:border-[#00E5FF] rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all
forms.button_primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#00C4DD] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,255,0.4)] rounded-lg px-6 h-12 transition-all
forms.button_glass: bg-white/[0.05] text-white hover:bg-white/[0.1] border border-white/[0.1] rounded-lg px-6 h-12 transition-all

scanning_animation.rings: Absolute elements with framer-motion scaling up and fading out (scale: [1, 1.5, 2], opacity: [0.5, 0]).

marketing_landing.hero: Massive H1 ('Most creator tools track numbers. We track perception.'). Abstract glowing orb image in background. Glass CTA.
marketing_landing.features: Bento grid layout showcasing dashboard modules (blurred/mocked UI snippets).
marketing_landing.testimonials: Avatars of creators with quote cards.

onboarding.layout: Minimalist centered card. Step 1: Input IG Username. Step 2: Scanning state.
onboarding.scanning_state: Simulate data fetching ('Analyzing latest 100 comments...', 'Detecting sentiment spikes...'). Use skeleton loaders and pulse animations.

dashboard.header: Creator name/handle, quick summary, re-scan button.
dashboard.sentiment_trend: Area chart (col-span-2 or 3) spanning time, showing spikes with annotation dots.
dashboard.top_narratives: Tags/chips inside a card: 'Authentic', 'Funny', 'Money-minded'. Each colored by sentiment.
dashboard.ai_recommendations: Text-heavy card with glowing border highlight, generating actionable advice.

hero_orb_abstract.description: Dark abstract orb with glowing rings
hero_orb_abstract.usage: Background or hero visual for the marketing landing page

ambient_background.usage: Use as a full-page background texture behind the glassmorphism elements to give depth

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided. DO NOT use generic Tailwind gray or slate for backgrounds; stick to the custom Midnight Blue (#05050A) hex.
Ensure all dashboard cards implement the 'glassmorphism_card' classes exactly. DO NOT use Shadcn's default white/solid cards.
The Hero heading must NOT be centered if the orb image is on the right. Favor asymmetrical bento grids.
For Recharts, always set the container wrapper to background transparent. Use `stroke="#00E5FF"` and apply an SVG drop-shadow filter for the 'glow' effect.
Use framer-motion for the 'Scanning' state in onboarding, mimicking a radar or pulse ring effect over the user's avatar.
Remember to include data-testid on all interactive elements as requested.
